title: lindernia minima
intro: Lindernia minima, also known as the lesser false pimpernel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Linderniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lindernia minima include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Lindernia minima is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
